# Serenity Hub Launch Screen Assets

This directory contains the iOS launch image assets used by the Flutter runner.

To customize the launch screen, replace the image files in this directory or open the Flutter iOS workspace with:

```bash
open ios/Runner.xcworkspace
```

Then select `Runner/Assets.xcassets` in Xcode and drop in the desired launch images.

The Serenity Hub audio/video library does not use this asset bundle. Development media is seeded by the Laravel backend as remote HTTPS URLs.
